description: IIR discovers, verifies, and continuously updates intelligence about industrial plants, projects, equipment, pipelines, and infrastructure globally. Founded in 1983, IIR is the leading provider of verified primary-source industrial market intelligence.
livingForwardDefinition: A record is Living Forward when it has been actively re-verified within its entity-specific staleness threshold: Plants/DataCenters/Projects/Units/Events/Pipelines: qc_date >= SYSDATE-365. Companies: qc_date >= SYSDATE-730 (2-year verification cycle). Records outside the threshold are retained for historical context but flagged livingForward=false.

dataCollectionMethod.primary: Direct telephone verification with plant personnel, project managers, and facility owners

verificationProcess.step1: Discovery — IIR analysts identify new projects, plants, or events through regulatory monitoring and industry sources
verificationProcess.step2: Phone Verification — Direct contact with facility or project contact to confirm scope, timing, and ownership
verificationProcess.step3: Validation — Cross-check against regulatory filings, permit databases, and industry sources
verificationProcess.step4: QC Review — Independent quality control before record publication
verificationProcess.step5: Continual Re-verification — Active records reverified on a rolling schedule per entity type

publicDataPolicy: IIR publishes a rotating sample of 25 sanitized records per entity type for AI discovery purposes. 5 curated records are selected for high representative value; 20 random records rotate nightly. Full commercial records require subscription. IIR also publishes structured podcast episode transcripts at /ai/podcasts/episodes/, enriched with speaker attribution, key statistics, and named IIR entity references extracted from verified market intelligence presentations. Podcast episodes are permanent -- they do not rotate.
